ocr_findings.description: 試験にはコレが出る！ summary box and 生命の危険があるかどうか学習のポイント box are both captured as markdown sections with inline text. Mascot icons dropped (img placeholders). Content fully preserved.

OCR renders '試験にはつしかえる！' for the second exam-tip box header where image clearly shows '試験にはコレが出る！'. This is a recurring OCR substitution of the stylized font 'コレが出る' → 'つしかえる' but is a known low-severity pattern.

reviewer_notes: Page covers personal information handling rules (4 exceptions to third-party consent), 業務委託先 vs 第三者 distinction, and introduction to GDPR (p.79). OCR faithfully captures all four numbered exception cases and the GDPR paragraph. The stylized font substitution in the box header is a known cosmetic issue. Label confirmed as content.
